Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn And Mtn Of Deft'S Cantrell Associates And Hsbc Bank Usa N.A., As Trustee, For Mental Examination Ot The Pltf Jenny S Vasquez
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: 9:03am
Dept. 608, Judge Curtis Karnow, nothing on record, clerk-Beth Wilber:
Cause called for discovery motion re Plaintiff Jenny S. Vasquez' mental examination by a Defense neurologist. Eric L. Lifschitz, appearing for the Plaintiff; Michael C. Hall & Robert W. Norman appearing for defendants Cantrell, Harris & Associates, Inc., and HSBC Bank USA, NA, et al.
Mr. Lifschitz provides the Court with an endorsed copy of an Amended Declaration; Mr. Norman lodges an endorsed copy of a Declaration, for the Court's review. Counsel then argue their respective cases.
9:20am
The Court asks that counsel quickly resolve the timing issue, and that the timing has to be resolved this week. Given the short time lines involved, the Court states that discovery cut-off is not going apply to discovery time lines. The Court gives defense counsel 3 business days to provide a typed order. The order is to include: Time and date of mental examination that will take place in Redwood City; that Plaintiff is to arrange that Ms. Vasquez or Mr. Lifschitz provide a recording device; that defense counsel will reimburse Ms. Vasquez for travel expenses; that report will also be in written form; that the mental examination will last up to 6 hours, with 3, 15 minute breaks every 2 hours.

Defense counsel are to email Judge Karnow the proposed order, within 24 hours, so he can make any changes he feels are necessary. Judge karnow provides counsel with his email address. (Mr. Norman provides a proposed order for a Motion to Quash that Judge Karnow will review, and make any changes he feels necessary.)
9:30am
Court adjourns

Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn And Mtn Of Deft'S Cantrell Associates And Hsbc Bank Usa N.A., As Trustee, For Mental Examination Ot The Pltf Jenny S Vasquez

Eric L. Lifschitz, Esq. and Aaron Darsky, Esq., appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Jenny S. Vasquez

Defendants Cantrell Associates and HSBC Bank USA N.A.'s motion for mental examination of the plaintiff Jenny S. Vasquez.
